name: incubate
description: Fire /incubate skill into an oracle's Claude TUI — thin router. Skill does the actual ghq clone, ψ/incubate symlink, .origins manifest, hub file, and mode workflow.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help:
maw incubate <source> [--oracle <name>] [--flash | --contribute | --status | --offload | --init] [--no-trigger] [--trigger <text>]
       Fire `/incubate <source>` into an oracle's Claude TUI. The skill clones via ghq, symlinks into ψ/incubate/, manages .origins + hub files.
       Default oracle: inferred from cwd (must be inside an oracle's repo). Override with --oracle.
       Mode flags pass straight through to the skill.
       Use --status to query existing incubations (no source arg required).
       Use --init to restore all origins from .origins manifest.
